zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Stuteville III於1075年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯時，他的父親Robert d'Estouteville36歲，母親Beatrix de Rieux31歲。他於1101年之後與Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1138年登記服兵役。他去世於1138年之後在英國越可爾可廷加姆，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Stuteville III was born in 1075, in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Robert d'Estouteville, was 36 and his mother, Beatrix de Rieux, was 31. He married Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith after 1101. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1138. He died after 1138, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

historicEvents.description: Le nom de la localité est attesté sous les formes Walemunt (sans date) ou au XIIe siècle, Galemunt au XIIe siècle, Walemont en 1236, Walemont en 1262, Walemont en 1272, Vallemont en 1300, Valmont en 1385. Il s'agit d'une formation toponymique médiévale en -mont au sens de « colline, hauteur », appellatif précédé du nom de personne scandinave Váli (vieux danois Wale) que l'on rencontre dans plusieurs noms de lieux de Normandie

Le nom de la localité est attesté sous les formes Walemunt (sans date) ou au XIIe siècle, Galemunt au XIIe siècle, Walemont en 1236, Walemont en 1262, Walemont en 1272, Vallemont en 1300, Valmont en 1385. Il s'agit d'une formation toponymique médiévale en -mont au sens de « colline, hauteur », appellatif précédé du nom de personne scandinave Váli (vieux danois Wale) que l'on rencontre dans plusieurs noms de lieux de Normandie

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Stuteville III est né en 1075, à Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Robert d'Estouteville, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Rieux, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith après 1101. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1138. Il est décédé après 1138, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Stuteville III 1075 in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert d'Estouteville 36 und seine Mutter Beatrix de Rieux 31. Er hat nach 1101 Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1138 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb nach 1138 in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Stuteville IIIが1075年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエストウテヴィレ-eカレスで生まれた時，父Robert d'Estoutevilleは36歳，母Beatrix de Rieuxは31歳であった。1101年以後にErneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1138年に兵役登録をした。彼は1138年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムで死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメヴァルモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Stuteville III(이)가 1075년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 에스토우테비레-e캘레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert d'Estouteville(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix de Rieux(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1101년 이후 Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1138년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1138년 이후 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 발몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Stuteville III nasceu em 1075, em Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert d'Estouteville, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Rieux, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith após 1101. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1138. Ele faleceu após 1138, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Stuteville III родился в 1075 г. в местности эстоутевилле-eкаллесь, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert d'Estouteville было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Rieux, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith после 1101 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1138 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер после 1138 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности валмонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Stuteville III nació en 1075, en Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert d'Estouteville, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Rieux, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith después de 1101. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1138. Murió después de 1138, en Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
